name: sandbox
description: Free-run test bench: NO success criteria, so nothing can 'fail'. The robot is parked on a red tile, so Optical(port).color() returns a real colour ('red') the instant the program runs instead of 'black'. A green tile sits 800 mm to the west, a blue tile 800 mm to the east, and a yellow tile 800 mm ahead (north); the gaps between tiles read 'black'. All four perimeter walls are tall and exactly 1500 mm from the centre start, giving a distance sensor a known target. Because there is no goal, the program runs for the full --max-time and the simulator emits the raw call log (every sensor read and screen print) instead of grading pass/fail. Use --render to watch the brain screen and robot live; change robot_start, or drive in render mode, to read the other tiles.
